fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one MIC measurement record.

fields.name: peptide_sequence
fields.description: Amino acid sequence of the antibacterial peptide in single-letter code (required on every row after cleaning).
fields.normalization_rule: Uppercase; remove spaces and hyphens; keep standard one-letter amino acid codes only.

fields.name: peptide_name
fields.description: Common or reported name of the peptide, if available in the source.

fields.name: organism_source
fields.description: Biological origin of the peptide: species (binomial) or 'synthetic' / 'unknown'.
fields.normalization_rule: Use binomial species name for natural peptides; 'synthetic' for de-novo designed peptides.

fields.name: pathogen_name
fields.description: Scientific name of the bacterial pathogen (species or genus).

fields.name: pathogen_strain
fields.description: Strain or isolate identifier when reported in the source.

fields.name: measurement_value
fields.description: MIC as a numeric scalar after ``scripts/clean_dataset.py``: leading/trailing censored symbols (>,<,≤,≥) stripped, hyphen ranges collapsed to the higher endpoint, and ± tails truncated to the main value. Intermediate CSV extracts under ``data/extracted/`` preserve richer verbatim tokens until cleaning.
fields.normalization_rule: Float-parseable scalar in the finalized ``dataset.csv``; see ``scripts/utils.py`` ``coerce_mic_measurement_to_scalar_string`` for coercion rules applied during cleaning.

fields.name: measurement_unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement_value normalized to a small canonical set (ug/mL, mg/L, uM, nM, pmol/ml).

fields.name: assay_method
fields.description: Experimental method used to determine MIC.
fields.normalization_rule: Prefer standard terms: broth microdilution, agar dilution, agar diffusion, E-test.

fields.name: medium
fields.description: Base growth medium name when reported (MHB, LB, CAMHB, PBS, etc.).

fields.name: inoculum_cfu_ml
fields.description: Bacterial inoculum density used in the assay (CFU/mL). Affects absolute MIC values.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as reported string (e.g. '5×10^5', '1e6'). Standard CLSI inoculum is 5×10^5 CFU/mL.

fields.name: incubation_time_h
fields.description: Incubation time in hours during the MIC assay.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier linking to an entry in specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: Category of source (paper, database, web page, etc.).

fields.name: publication_year
fields.description: Year of publication or database entry. Useful for tracking data recency.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: URL or landing page for the source.
